column.text:
• Philadelphia Phillies placed CF Johan Rojas on the 60-day injured list to undergo right elbow UCL repair surgery.
• Arizona Diamondbacks transferred RHP Ryne Nelson to the 60-day injured list due to a strained right elbow.
• Toronto Blue Jays placed RHP Max Scherzer on the 15-day injured list, retroactive to June 14, with back spasms.
• New York Mets placed 2B Marcus Semien on the 10-day injured list because of a left hip flexor strain.
• The Los Angeles Angels designated veteran first baseman Trey Mancini for assignment.
• Chicago Cubs designated right-handed pitcher Yosver Zulueta for assignment.
• Texas Rangers activated shortstop Corey Seager from the 7-day injured list.
• Houston Astros sent RHP Lance McCullers Jr. on a rehab assignment to Triple-A Sugar Land.
• San Diego Padres sent 2B Jake Cronenworth on a rehab assignment to Triple-A El Paso.

x_article.title: MLB Daily Recap
